creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172430
py-phply.shar

phply is a parser for the PHP programming language written using PLY,
a Lex/YACC-style parser generator toolkit for Python.

This port will be used as a dependency for security/w3af.

- portlint compliant
- poudriere tests ok FreeBSD 9.3|10.3|11 - i386|amd64
